description: Red Book home dashboard showing complaint summary cards for two sections and quick actions to view lists or create a new ticket.

notes.request: No filter, search, sort, or pagination controls are visible on this screen; request remains empty.
notes.statusSummary: Each section displays Total, Pending, and Closed. Section 1 includes Registered while section 2 includes Forwarded; missing statuses are represented as 0 for a stable shape.
notes.isStarred: Maps to the header favorite icon state for the Red Book screen.
